query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN ytdStartPrice IS NOT NULL AND ytdStartPrice != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_ytd_start,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ytdPerformance IS NOT NULL AND ytdPerformance != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_ytd_perf
FROM stocks
command:

  SUM(CASE WHEN ytdStartPrice IS NOT NULL AND ytdStartPrice != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_ytd_start,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ytdPerformance IS NOT NULL AND ytdPerformance != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_ytd_perf
